titles.title: We Are Here to Praise You

authors.author: Graham Kendrick
Graham Kendrick
Wir sind hier zusammen, wollen dich erhöhn

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We are here to praise You Lift our hearts and sing We are here to give You The best that we can bring And it is our love Rising from our hearts

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Everything within us cries, "Abba Father" Help us now to give You Pleasure and delight Heart and mind and will That say, "I love You Lord!"
